content:
Neptune in Libra: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Neptune in Libra blends the archetypal drive of Neptune (where you dream, dissolve boundaries, and seek the transcendent) with the Air, cardinal nature of Libra.

  • Planet: Neptune — dreams, imagination, spirituality, illusion, compassion
  • Sign: Libra (Air/Cardinal) — balance, relationship, beauty, justice, harmony

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
